Makes target monster non-hostile for 15 seconds or until attacked

cooking-recipes.Ingredients: 15 fruit, 10 fruit, 5 fruit (each a different type)

cooking-recipes.Benefits:
Acorn: +500 Max MP
Apple: +500 Max HP
Cherry: +20 Max MP
Grape: +10% SPD
Green Grape: +20% SPD
Strawberry: +10% SKD
Tangerine: +20 MR

cooking-recipes.Where to learn: Random drop from Secret Cow Level
Complete the quest: Supply Loures Army

cooking-ingredients.Name: Apple
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Mileth Crypt (Spiders, Rats); Rucesion Black Market (Wureen) for 500 gold each

cooking-ingredients.Name: Acorn
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Scattered throughout different towns; East Woodlands; West Woodlands

cooking-ingredients.Name: Cherry
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Suomi Cherry fields, Wilderness Cherry fields, Various town restaurants (Mileth)

cooking-ingredients.Name: Grapes
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Suomi Grape fields, Various town restaurants (Mileth)

cooking-ingredients.Name: Vegetable
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Mileth Crypt (Spiders, Rats); Various town restaurants (Mileth)

cooking-ingredients.Name: Flour
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Boss drop (Funny Bones, Serious Bones, Lost Orc, Banshee, King Octopus, Mythic bosses)

cooking-ingredients.Name: Marinade
cooking-ingredients.Where to obtain: Secret Cow Level, High level Mythic bosses (need clarity)
